title: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee Pod Machine, Centrifusion Technology, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth Enabled, Energy Saving Design, Multiple Cup Sizes, Compatible with Vertuo Pods by Krups in Matte Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Wholesale Velar (VAT Reg) and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SUPERIOR QUALITY FROM BEAN TO CUP Nespresso Coffee Pods protect the freshness and aromas of our coffee from the moment they were roasted and ground. Exclusively works with Nespresso Vertuo pods featuring over 30 blends.

VERSATILE COFFEE STYLES – From espressos, to iced or benefit-enhanced coffees, This Nespresso coffee machine brews 7 coffee cup sizes: Ristretto 25ml, espresso 40ml, double espresso 80ml, gran lungo Cup 150ml, Mug 230ml, Large mug 355ml and carafe 535ml. Includes complimentary welcome set of 12 pods

INNOVATIVE TECHNOLOGY – Nespresso Vertuo Next coffee machine heats up in 30 seconds, integrated with the latest technology that reads the coffee pod’s barcode and automatically adjusts the brewing settings. Using a precise and customized amount of water, energy and coffee for each blend gives you the best possible cup, every time.

SMART COFFEE MACHINE - Your Bluetooth and WiFi enabled Vertuo Next coffee machine allows you to connect to the Nespresso mobile app and get the latest coffee experience through automatic machine software updates, descaling alerts and helpful hints and tips.

SUSTAINABLE COFFEE MAKER – Nespresso Next is made from 54% recycled plastics with A+ energy consumption and automatic turn off feature after 2 minutes. Nespresso Vertuo pods are made of at least 85% recycled aluminium and when you recycle your Nespresso capsules, you may help further decrease the carbon footprint of your cup of coffee. Our free programme makes recycling your used capsules easy and convenient

BARISTA STYLE COFFEE AT HOME - Tailor your cup to your personal taste preferences with up to 7 cup sizes and a variety of Aeroccino Milk Frothers (sold separately) to help you create a world of coffee experiences from our wide range of coffees, each carefully crafted to be enjoyed black or as the base to create your favourite hot or cold frothy coffee shop drinks: Cappuccino, Latte, Flat White, Iced recipes
